---
title: "An Infinite Hazelnut Tree: a Mathematical Blog"
listing:
  contents: blogPosts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

![The $E_6$ Dynkin diagram - illustrated by [Emily Windes](https://emilyautumnwindes.com)](E6_cover.png)

The namesake of the blog comes from Grothendieck's famous quote from *Récoltes et Semailles*, where he likened the art of mathematical problem solving to trying to crack open a hard nut.
In this blog, you will find a random assortment of nuts that currently interest me, that is articles about mathematical ideas and problems I find interesting and topics I am currently trying to learn.
